data.body:
EPIC CLOSE + AC RECONCILIATION (2026-07-19). Closing capstone for the R1-R7 plan-review integration epic. All 13 children CLOSED: E1(e95e), E2(d125), E3(def5), E5(5342), E6(a880), R1(59b7), R2(b080), R3(3a27), R4(03a9), R5(ea39), R6(5dac), R7(b1a4), and the standing-recorder story d8a5-7a66. No orphan/extra children.

OUTCOME (3 lines):
1. ADVISORY-FIRST PIVOT: the original batch-eval-gated plan was retired (operator-approved cost decision) — R1/R3/R4 ship in advisory posture (never block), pass a bounded ≤~8-run sanity check, and are auto-monitored by d8a5's zero-LLM standing effectiveness recorder, with the advisory→blocking promotion gate documented in docs/plan-review-gate.md. The 'no detection-bearing rec without its eval gate' intent is met by advisory-safety + standing dogfood, not pre-ship batch evals.
2. E2/E3 RESCOPED: deterministic corpus/harness built as WIP; the expensive LLM batch baseline PERMANENTLY REJECTED on cost and superseded by story d8a5 (criterion_effectiveness.py, change #798); mining independently confirmed dead (~4 plan-v3 baselines vs the ~200 the counterfactual replay assumed).
3. κ DESCOPED: E1's finding-adjudication/inter-rater-κ corpus was invalidated (tool-less/plan-truncated labeling ~79% contaminated) and descoped; the outcome corpus IS frozen + committed under docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/. Human gold set parked as idea e59d.

SPEND: this-session eval spend kept low by rejecting the ~$3-5K batch evals in favor of d8a5 dogfooding (LLM spend minimized; human-adjudication time was over budget).

The batch-eval → advisory-first + standing-dogfood pivot, the E2/E3 batch-baseline deferral, and the κ descope were all OPERATOR-APPROVED cost decisions made during execution — they replace, rather than fail, the original plan. AC block on the epic reconciled to reflect delivered reality; original ACs retained verbatim under 'Original Acceptance Criteria (pre-reconciliation, for audit)'.
